channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/diegosouzapw — Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
item.description: Free AI gateway unifying access to multiple LLM providers with integrated token compression for coding tools.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] google/agents-cli — The CLI and skills that turn any coding assistant into an expert at creating, evaluating, and deploying AI agents on Google Cloud.
item.description: Google released agents-cli, a command-line tool for creating, evaluating, and deploying AI agents on Google Cloud.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/ogulcancelik — agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
item.description: sponsors/ogulcancelik, a terminal agent multiplexer, is trending on GitHub.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] microsoft/AI-For-Beginners — 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!
item.description: Microsoft released AI-For-Beginners, a 12-week curriculum with 24 lessons introducing artificial intelligence fundamentals.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] facebook/astryx — An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready
item.description: Astryx is an open-source design system by Facebook, fully customizable and agent-ready.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/obra — An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
item.description: sponsors/obra is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] not much happened today
item.description: [AINews] not much happened today

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations
item.description: Language generation in the limit is reformulated as precision-recall trade-off, where controlled error rates can improve target language coverage.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction
item.description: Researchers developed rule-based methods to extract lexical information from an Arabic-English dictionary using n-gram and KWIC analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Developmental Trajectories of Situation Modeling and Mentalizing in Transformer Language Models
item.description: Study traces mental state reasoning across Olmo2 and Pythia model training stages, finding false belief task performance emerges late and is fragile.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A French OSCE Dialogue Dataset and Controllable Virtual Patient System for Clinical Training
item.description: Researchers develop a French OSCE dialogue dataset and LLM-based virtual patient system for medical student clinical training with automated feedback.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Legal Domain Adaptation of Modern BERT Models
item.description: ModernBERT pre-trained on US court opinions achieves significant improvements on legal tasks, supports 8,192-token sequences, and is publicly released.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Turn-Averaged SAEs for Feature Discovery and Long-Context Attribution
item.description: Turn-averaged sparse autoencoders aggregate model activations across conversational turns to enable interpretable feature extraction at long context lengths.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Depth-Staggered Fibonacci Spacing for Sparse Attention: Static Schedules Beat Learned Dilation and Extrapolate Where Dense Attention Fails
item.description: Static depth-staggered Fibonacci sparse attention outperforms learned variants and extrapolates to 4x context length while dense attention fails.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SEAD: Competence-Aware On-Policy Distillation via Entropy-Guided Supervision
item.description: SEAD applies entropy-guided supervision to on-policy distillation, adaptively selecting tokens and annealing KL divergence based on student competence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Correct codes for the wrong reasons? validating LLMs as measurement instruments for theoretical constructs
item.description: Grain calibration validates LLM construct validity by decomposing constructs into clause-level components, testing each against text with explicit theory-derived rules.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Phonological Perception of Sign Language Models
item.description: Sign language recognition models exhibit emergent phonological sensitivity but demonstrate architectural trade-offs in handshape versus location feature detection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AnTenA: Actionable and Explainable Tensor Analysis System with Large Language Models
item.description: AnTenA uses LLMs to explain hidden patterns in multi-aspect data without requiring labels or metadata.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SEATauBench: Adapting Tool-Agent-User Evaluation Into Low-Resource Southeast Asian Languages
item.description: SEATauBench evaluates AI agent performance across five Southeast Asian languages, revealing capabilities degrade significantly with increased task localization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DriftGuard: Safety-Aware Multi-Monitor Detection and Selective Adaptation for Evolving Toxicity Moderation
item.description: DriftGuard detects evolving toxicity threats through multi-monitor drift tracking and selective model adaptation, improving toxic content detection recall.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] 5ting at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Strong End-to-End Multi-Turn RAG via LLM-Based Reranking and Faithfulness Control
item.description: 5ting system for SemEval-2026 Task 8 uses dense retrieval, LLM reranking, and evidence-constrained generation for multi-turn RAG.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Majority Vote Silences Minority Values: Annotator Disagreement at the Hate/Offensive Boundary in HateXplain
item.description: Majority vote aggregation in hate speech annotation masks disagreement at hate/offensive boundaries, reducing model accuracy by 22-28 percentage points.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Structure-Preserving Document Translation via Multi-Stage LLM Pipeline: A Case Study in Marathi
item.description: LLM-based pipeline translates Marathi government documents to English while maintaining document structure, layout, and formatting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Labeling Training Data for Entity Matching Using Large Language Models
item.description: Using LLMs to label training data produces student entity-matching models with performance comparable to those trained on task-specific benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Heterogeneous Safety Impacts of Benign Multilingual Fine-Tuning
item.description: Fine-tuning language models in non-English languages causes unpredictable safety degradation decoupled from capability gains, indicating English-only safety evaluation is insufficient.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Open but Incompatible: A License Compatibility Analysis of Corpora for Low-Resource African Languages
item.description: African language NLP corpora often violate Creative Commons license terms through incompatibility, misrepresentation, derivative restrictions, and persistent data loss.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Memory-Managed Long-Context Attention: A Preliminary Study of Editable Request-Local Memory
item.description: Researchers propose memory-managed long-context attention that combines sparse attention with explicit editable memory slots, outperforming pure sparse or fixed-state approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PASTA: A Paraphrasing And Self-Training Approach for Knowledge Updating in LLMs
item.description: PASTA framework uses paraphrasing and self-training to update LLMs with news knowledge, achieving 0.82 accuracy on factual question answering.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Latent Bridges for Multi-Table Question Answering
item.description: GRAB uses graph encoding and latent token bridges to improve multi-table question answering while keeping the LLM frozen.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FinInvest-GTCN: Explainable Graph-Temporal-Causal Modeling for Risk-Aware Investment Decision Optimization
item.description: FinInvest-GTCN combines graph, temporal, and causal neural network components to predict venture capital investment returns with explainable risk assessments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EVLA: An Electro-Aware Multimodal Assistant for Physically-Grounded Driving Reasoning and Control
item.description: EVLA adds real-time vehicle-state awareness to vision-language models for autonomous driving, improving accuracy by 5.6% and reducing inference latency by 36%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A3M: Adaptive, Adversarial and Multi-Objective Learning for Strategic Bidding in Repeated Auctions
item.description: A3M framework integrates adaptive DRL, adversarial modeling, and multi-objective optimization for strategic bidding in repeated auctions, reducing regret by 30-40%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond the Mean: Three-Axis Fidelity for Aligning LLM-Based Survey Simulators from Small Pilot Data
item.description: Fine-tuning LLMs on pilot survey data best recovers population statistics across structural, marginal, and individual fidelity dimensions despite subgroup variation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can LLMs Hire Fairly? Racial Bias in Resume Screening
item.description: Audit of 14 LLMs reveals hiring bias reversal: 2023 models favored White candidates; 2024+ models showed neutral or pro-Black bias.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fine-Tuning General-Purpose Large Language Models for Agricultural Applications:A Reproducible Framework and Evaluation Protocol Based on Qwen3-8B
item.description: AgriTune-R framework fine-tunes Qwen3-8B with data governance, retrieval-augmented generation, and expert evaluation protocols for agriculture.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BERTomelo: Your Portuguese Encoder Best Friend
item.description: BERTomelo is a new Portuguese language encoder outperforming previous models using ModernBERT architecture and a large Portuguese corpus.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Conversational Domain Adaptation of IndicTrans2 across 21 Indic Languages via Experience Replay and Model Soups
item.description: IndicTrans2 improved for conversational register across 21 Indic languages using experience replay and model soups, achieving +6.2 mean chrF gain while maintaining FLORES performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Can AI Draw Science? A Benchmark for Evaluating Scientific Figure Generation by Text-to-Image and Multimodal Models
item.description: Researchers introduce SciDraw-Bench, a benchmark evaluating text-to-image models' ability to generate scientific figures across eight types and ten disciplines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Necessity of a Liquid Substrate for Mesh Intelligence
item.description: Study demonstrates liquid networks are necessary for mesh intelligence systems lacking shared clocks, coordinators, and retraining capability when processing irregularly-timed data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: RL Researchers Need to Distinguish Between Solving Simulators and Using Simulators as a Proxy
item.description: RL researchers often conflate solving simulators with using them as deployment proxies, requiring distinct approaches, algorithms, and evaluation metrics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning to Distributedly Estimate under Partially Known Dynamics: A Covariance-Agnostic Neural Kalman Consensus Filter
item.description: Covariance-Agnostic Neural Kalman Consensus Filter combines domain knowledge with neural networks for distributed latent state estimation, outperforming traditional Kalman and particle filters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] S-GAI: Spectral Geometry-Aware Initialization for Sigmoidal MLPs -- From Dataset Geometry to Network Weights
item.description: S-GAI proposes spectral geometry-aware weight initialization for sigmoidal MLPs using SVD-based class geometry, outperforming Xavier initialization on image datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] scKDGM: KAN-guided Dynamic Graph Masked Learning for Single-Cell RNA-seq Clustering
item.description: scKDGM integrates masked learning with dynamic graph optimization for single-cell RNA sequencing clustering, outperforming 10 baseline methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation for Regression
item.description: Counterfactual Residual Data Augmentation (CRDA) generates synthetic training samples for tabular regression by exploiting residual invariance, improving regressor accuracy on limited data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Singular Learning and Occam's Razor in Deep Monomial Networks
item.description: Critical points in deep monomial networks occur at subnetworks with inactive neurons, mathematically explaining the implicit bias toward simpler functions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] An Agentic AI Pipeline for Appliance-Level Energy Anomaly Detection and LLM-Driven Recommendations
item.description: Agentic pipeline combining LSTM forecasting and VAE anomaly detection with LLM reasoning generates prioritized maintenance recommendations for office appliances.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Modelling Emotional Memory in Children with Tensor Networks
item.description: Tensor network model achieves 77.98% accuracy modeling how emotional valence influences order-dependent memory recall in children.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Trainable-by-Parts Operator Learning Framework: Bridging DeepONet and Karhunen-Loeve Expansions for Large-Scale Applications
item.description: Karhunen-Loeve Deep Neural Network framework achieves two-order-of-magnitude speedup for large-scale operator learning compared to DeepONet.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Gravitational Interpretation of Fine-Tuning Reversion
item.description: Fine-tuning causes representational drift toward early training behaviors via a reversion direction, reducing alignment safety gains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] NIVA: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Actionable Earth System Intelligence
item.description: NIVA, a multimodal foundation model trained on Earth system simulations, learns coupled ocean-atmosphere dynamics for improved subseasonal-to-seasonal climate prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Improving Coherence in Hierarchical Time Series Forecasting using Structured Temporal Fusion
item.description: Hierarchical Temporal Fusion improves hierarchical time series forecasting by embedding coherence directly into training via structured embeddings and a coherence-aware loss function.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometric Measurements of the Axiom of Choice in Neural Proof Embeddings
item.description: Study shows axiom of choice has measurable geometric signature in neural proof embeddings, affecting automated theorem prover performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Replica Symmetry Breaking and Algorithmic Thresholds in Empirical Risk Minimization under Multi-Index Model
item.description: Research characterizes regions of the empirical risk landscape accessible to polynomial-time algorithms in high-dimensional multi-index supervised learning models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] What LLMs explain is not what they believe: Evaluating explanation sufficiency under models' own input beliefs
item.description: New metric SCSuff shows large language model explanations are insufficient to explain the actual process generating their outputs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Randomized Exploration for Linear Bandits via Absolute Perturbations
item.description: Absolute Thompson Sampling modifies Thompson Sampling for linear bandits, ensuring optimism while maintaining computational efficiency and enabling simpler regret analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Improving Patient Subtyping on Longitudinal Data using Representations from Mamba-based Architecture
item.description: Mamba-based self-supervised model improves patient subtyping on longitudinal electronic health records.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When More Sampling Hurts: The Modal Ceiling and Correlation Ceiling of Test-Time Scaling
item.description: Extra test-time sampling for language models hits a modal ceiling where coverage plateaus; the bottleneck is answer selection, not generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Closed-Form Steepest Descent Direction toward Flat Minima: Reducing Upper Bounds on the Loss Hessian Eigenspectrum in Neural Networks
item.description: Researchers derive a closed-form gradient for the Wolkowicz-Styan bound to create HSR Regularization, which guides neural networks toward flat minima with narrower Hessian eigenvalue spectra.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Entropy Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Zero-Sum Stochastic Differential Games in a Regime-Switching Jump-Diffusion Process
item.description: Entropy-regularized reinforcement learning method addresses parameter misspecification in zero-sum stochastic differential games with regime switching.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Entropy-Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Linear-Quadratic Stackelberg Differential Games in Regime-Switching Diffusion Models
item.description: Entropy-regularized reinforcement learning enables exploratory policies for linear-quadratic Stackelberg games under regime-switching dynamics.
